response.justification: Strong generalist with 15+ years of software craftsmanship, TypeScript/Node.js depth, and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI work, falls well short of the 8-year requirement for production AI solutions, and lacks demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), and large cloud-platform AI deployments. Could be a fit if the AI work at re:cinq is deeper than described, otherwise below the Staff bar for this specialized role.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Deep TypeScript/Node.js background plus polyglot range (Python-adjacent skills, DLang, Java, C++)
Proven customer-facing technical leadership: workshops, talks, founding GISCollective, mentoring
concerns: Does not meet the 8+ years of AI-driven solution development requirement (~1 year visible)
No explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Limited evidence of designing/building AI systems on AWS/GCP/Azure at production scale
